Antimicrobial resistance poses a critical threat to vulnerable neonatal patients. @tbl-abr-infection-rate displays infection rates caused by resistant pathogens such as MRSA, VRE, and third-generation cephalosporin-resistant organisms. Monitoring these rates is crucial for assessing the burden of drug-resistant infections in your unit and evaluating the effectiveness of antimicrobial stewardship programs. Elevated rates may signal the need for enhanced infection control measures, antibiotic prescribing review, or environmental screening protocols.
